speaker: speaker1
text: Gross ! What are you doing to yourself ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Chill ! I'm just curling my eyelashes .

speaker: speaker1
text: It looks like some kind of primitive form of torture .

speaker: speaker2
text: You're such a wimp ! You're afraid of an eyelash curler .

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , you might pinch your eyelid ! Or lose an eyeball !

speaker: speaker2
text: It just makes my eyelashes curl upwards .
